issues.detail: The skill does not specify how to handle API failures or malformed responses, leaving error handling undefined.
The instructions lack concrete code or example prompts, making it difficult to implement the detection pipeline directly.
The skill requires Node.js 18+ and the Anthropic SDK, limiting compatibility to specific environments.

scenarios.name: short-text-skip
scenarios.rationale: Both responses omit the required statement about skipping automated scoring for texts under 200 words and the explanation of why short texts yield unreliable results.

scenarios.name: full-detection-pipeline
scenarios.rationale: Neither response provides the required analysis results, verdicts, or scores; both fall short of the rubric.
